name: Caponata Di Melanzane[peppers & Tomatoes, W/
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Tomatoes, peeled and chopped - about 3-4 regular tomatoes
1/4 cup Olives, green and black, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Before cooking, cut the eggplant into cubes; do not peel.
2. Place the cubes in plenty of water with coarse salt. Leave for about 30 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, peel and coarsely chop the tomatoes.
4. Heat a large saucepan over medium heat.
5. Add the olive oil and heat until fragrant.
6. Add onion and garlic; sauté until translucent.
7. Add peppers and cook until they start to wilt.
8. Add eggplant cubes and cook for 15 minutes.
9. Add the tomatoes, season with salt, pepper, and oregano; cook until peppers and eggplant are tender but not mushy.
10. Add capers, olives, and anchovies.
11. Remove from heat and let stand at room temperature for several hours.
